refnamediv.refpurpose: Segment a 3D scalar volume with k-means.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [labels, centers] = imsegkmeans3(volume, clusterCount); [labels, centers] = imsegkmeans3(volume, clusterCount, maxIterations)

listitem.para: Maximum k-means iteration count. Default is implementation-defined.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Performs compact scalar k-means clustering over all voxels and returns a 1-based label volume and cluster centers.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Source reference: official OpenCV documentation. Example 1 is an adapted OpenCV workflow; Example 2 is an independent IPCV workflow.
